description: A reader should fail sync when the seed replaces advertised heads and then requests the withdrawn root revision again.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because replace=true withdrew the old advertised root revision before it was requested again.
Reader does not keep writing the stale sync state after the withdrawn root-revision WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a second post-HELLO advertised-root replacement violation.
The harness keeps the normal peer-store transcript but injects a replacing HEADS plus a stale root-revision WANT before BYE.
